title: PW-WSF-500 Environment Standard
description: PhysWorldLM World Specification Format (PW-WSF-500) v1.0. Canonical definition of the environmental state surrounding all entities in a PhysWorldLM simulation. Covers planetary context, atmosphere, ocean, lighting, EM environment, acoustics, radiation, chemical/biological hazards, navigation, communications, sensor effects, and physics modifiers. Does NOT own physical laws (physics.schema.json), time-varying weather phenomena (weather.schema.json), or static surface geometry (terrain.schema.json). Engine-independent, SI-unit throughout.
$comment: Standard: PW-WSF-500 | Status: Active | Publication: 2025-01-01 | References: ISA 1976 Standard Atmosphere, ICAO Doc 7488, US MIL-STD-210, NATO STANAG 4082, NRLMSISE-00, WGS-84, EGM2008, COESA, ITU-R P series, IEC 62232, Beaufort Scale, Douglas Sea Scale, Saffir-Simpson, NOAA, NASA CEA, ESA ECSS, ISO 2533 | Compatibility: world.schema.json v1.x, material.schema.json v1.x, physics.schema.json, terrain.schema.json, weather.schema.json

altitude_m.description: Height above WGS-84 ellipsoid. SI: m.

AltitudeRange.description: A vertical extent bounded by minimum and maximum altitude.

min_m.description: Minimum altitude (negative for below sea level). SI: m.

QuantityWithUnit.description: A physical quantity with explicit SI unit.

WindVector.description: Wind state at a specific altitude layer.

direction_deg.description: Meteorological wind direction (from, clockwise from north). SI: °.

GasSpecies.description: A gas species and its volume fraction in a gas mixture.

tlv_ppm.description: Threshold limit value in parts per million.

SensorDegradation.description: Environmental degradation factor applied to a sensor modality.

false_alarm_rate_delta.description: Additive change in false alarm rate.

SpectralIrradiance.description: Spectral irradiance curve as [wavelength_nm, W/(m²·nm)] pairs.

environment_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this environment definition.

environment_name.description: Canonical environment name (e.g. 'Kabul Urban Combat AO', 'ISS Low Earth Orbit', 'North Atlantic Storm').

description.description: Detailed description of the environmental scenario.

template_id.description: UUID of a parent template this environment was derived from.

ontology.description: Semantic identifiers for ontology and knowledge graph interoperability.

classification.description: Environment type, biome, climate, and domain classification.

koppen_class.description: Köppen-Geiger climate classification (e.g. Af, BWh, Dfc, ET).

spatial_extent.description: Geographic and volumetric extent of this environment.

map_projection.description: Map projection for 2D representations (e.g. EPSG:4326, EPSG:32637).

origin.description: Geographic or planetary origin of the local coordinate frame.

origin_ecef_m.description: Origin in ECEF (Earth-centred, Earth-fixed) coordinates. SI: m.

bounding_box_local_m.description: Local Cartesian bounding volume. SI: m.

depth_limit_m.description: Maximum water or underground depth (negative = below surface). SI: m.

area_km2.description: Approximate horizontal surface area. SI: km².

scale_factor.description: Global scale factor if environment is a scaled model (1.0 = real scale).

regional_zones.description: Named sub-regions within this environment (AOs, sectors, biomes).

time.description: Simulation time reference and clock configuration.

simulation_elapsed_s.description: Elapsed simulation time from start. SI: s.

modified_julian_date.description: Modified Julian Date (MJD = JD − 2400000.5) at start.

mission_elapsed_time_s.description: Mission elapsed time from mission epoch. SI: s.

utc_offset_h.description: UTC offset for local solar time. SI: h.

solar_time_h.description: Apparent solar time (local) at origin. SI: h.

planetary.description: Physical properties of the host planet or body.

gravitational_parameter_m3_s2.description: Standard gravitational parameter μ = GM. SI: m³/s².

surface_gravity_m_s2.description: Surface gravity at equator. SI: m/s².

gravity_vector_m_s2.description: Local gravity vector in world frame. SI: m/s².

axial_tilt_deg.description: Axial tilt relative to orbital plane. SI: °.

orbital_period_s.description: Orbital period around primary. SI: s.

surface_pressure_pa.description: Mean surface atmospheric pressure. SI: Pa.

geoid_model.description: Geoid model used (e.g. EGM2008, EGM96, MarsGeoid2011).

magnetic_field.description: Planetary magnetic field at simulation origin.

total_intensity_t.description: Total magnetic field intensity. SI: T.

declination_deg.description: Magnetic declination (from true north, positive east). SI: °.

field_vector_t.description: Full field vector in NED frame. SI: T.

model.description: Magnetic field model used (e.g. WMM2025, IGRF-13).

atmosphere.description: Atmospheric state at the simulation origin and altitude profile. Owns the current atmospheric condition; weather.schema.json owns dynamic meteorological events.

surface_conditions.description: Atmospheric state at the reference surface level.

temperature_k.description: Air temperature at surface. SI: K.

pressure_pa.description: Total air pressure at surface. SI: Pa.

density_kg_m3.description: Air mass density at surface. SI: kg/m³.

speed_of_sound_m_s.description: Speed of sound in air. SI: m/s.

refractive_index.description: Atmospheric refractive index at surface (≈1.000293 for standard air).

altitude_profile.description: Atmosphere state at discrete altitude layers (for non-standard atmospheres).

composition.description: Gas composition at the surface level.

extinction_coefficient_per_m.description: Atmospheric extinction coefficient β. SI: m⁻¹.

pm10_ug_m3.description: PM10 particulate matter concentration. SI: µg/m³.

base_m.description: Cloud base altitude AGL. SI: m.

top_m.description: Cloud top altitude AGL. SI: m.

liquid_water_content_kg_m3.description: Cloud liquid water content. SI: kg/m³.

ice_water_content_kg_m3.description: Cloud ice water content. SI: kg/m³.

ozone_dobson.description: Total column ozone in Dobson units.

boundary_layer_height_m.description: Atmospheric boundary layer top height. SI: m.

ocean.description: Ocean and water body state. Applicable for maritime, underwater, and coastal environments.

salinity_psu.description: Practical Salinity Units (PSU). Open ocean ≈ 35 PSU.

density_kg_m3.description: Seawater density at surface. SI: kg/m³.

depth_profile.description: Ocean state at discrete depth layers.

depth_m.description: Depth below surface (positive downward). SI: m.

sound_velocity_profile.description: SVP for sonar and underwater acoustics modelling.

significant_wave_height_m.description: H_s (average of highest 1/3 waves). SI: m.

current_height_m.description: Current tidal height above MLLW. SI: m.

system_name.description: Named current system (e.g. Gulf Stream, Kuroshio).

concentration_fraction.description: Sea ice concentration (0=open water, 1=full ice cover).

thickness_m.description: Mean sea ice thickness. SI: m.

bottom_depth_m.description: Water column depth at the reference location. SI: m.

terrain_ref.description: Reference to terrain.schema.json — environment does NOT own terrain geometry.

weather_ref.description: Reference to weather.schema.json — environment does NOT own weather events.

current_weather_summary.description: Short textual METAR-like weather summary (e.g. 'CAVOK', 'BKN025 -RA BR').

elevation_deg.description: Solar elevation angle above horizon. SI: °.

direction_enu.description: Unit vector toward sun in ENU frame.

irradiance_w_m2.description: Direct normal irradiance (DNI) at top of atmosphere. SI: W/m².

surface_irradiance_w_m2.description: Direct irradiance at surface (after atmospheric attenuation). SI: W/m².

illuminance_lux.description: Lunar illuminance at surface. SI: lux.

sky_hdri_ref.description: URI to an HDRI sky dome asset.

correlated_color_temperature_k.description: Sky CCT for rendering. SI: K.

artificial_lighting.description: Artificial light sources in the environment.

average_lux.description: Average artificial illuminance at ground level. SI: lux.

electromagnetic_environment.description: RF, radar, EM noise, and signal environment.

solar_activity.description: Solar activity affecting EM propagation and radiation.

dst_index_nt.description: Dst geomagnetic storm index. SI: nT.

tec_tecu.description: Total Electron Content. SI: TECU (10¹⁶ el/m²).

foF2_mhz.description: Critical frequency of F2 layer. SI: MHz.

muf_mhz.description: Maximum Usable Frequency for HF sky-wave. SI: MHz.

hf_absorption_db.description: HF absorption due to D-layer. SI: dB.

em_noise_floor_dbm.description: Background EM noise floor at 1 GHz. SI: dBm.

gnss_visible_satellites.description: Number of GNSS satellites in view.

ducting_present.description: True if atmospheric ducting is present (anomalous propagation).

ambient_noise_level_db_spl.description: Broadband ambient sound pressure level. SI: dB re 20 µPa.

sound_speed_surface_m_s.description: Speed of sound in air at surface. SI: m/s.

reverberation_time_s.description: RT60 (time for 60 dB decay). SI: s. Applicable for enclosed environments.

underwater_ambient_db_upa.description: Underwater ambient noise level (Wenz curves). SI: dB re 1 µPa.

radiation_environment.description: Natural and artificial ionising and non-ionising radiation levels.

background_dose_rate_gy_h.description: Natural background ionising radiation dose rate. SI: Gy/h.

gamma_dose_rate_gy_h.description: Gamma radiation dose rate. SI: Gy/h.

cosmic_ray_flux_per_cm2_s.description: Galactic cosmic ray flux. SI: particles/(cm²·s).

inner_belt.description: True if inside inner Van Allen belt.

outer_belt.description: True if inside outer Van Allen belt.

peak_field_v_m.description: Peak EMP electric field. SI: V/m.

chemical_environment.description: Atmospheric chemical hazards, pollutants, and CBRN agents.

hazardous_gases.description: Toxic or hazardous gas species present above threshold.

explosion_vapors.description: Explosive or flammable vapours in the atmosphere.

lel_fraction.description: Fraction of lower explosive limit (0–1 = 0%–100% LEL).

biological_environment.description: Biological hazards, vegetation type, and ecological context.

canopy_height_m.description: Mean vegetation canopy height. SI: m.

leaf_area_index.description: Leaf area index (m² leaf / m² ground).

wildlife_presence.description: Notable wildlife species present (may affect simulation).

navigation_environment.description: Navigation aids, coordinate frames, and reference data.

true_north_deg.description: True north azimuth in world frame.

magnetic_north_deg.description: Magnetic north azimuth in world frame.

magnetic_declination_deg.description: Magnetic declination (positive = east of true north). SI: °.

grid_declination_deg.description: Grid declination (map grid vs true north). SI: °.

gravity_m_s2.description: Local gravity magnitude for INS initialisation. SI: m/s².

earth_rotation_rate_rad_s.description: Earth rotation rate at latitude. SI: rad/s.

navigation_aids.description: Navigation beacons and aids active in this environment.

communications_environment.description: Radio communications conditions, satellite visibility, and network availability.

line_of_sight_range_m.description: Maximum radio line-of-sight range at reference altitude. SI: m.

minimum_elevation_deg.description: Minimum satellite elevation for link. SI: °.

atmospheric_loss_model.description: Atmospheric gas and cloud attenuation model.

link_name.description: e.g. Link-16, Link-22, VMF, JREAP, CDS.

sensor_environment_effects.description: Per-modality environmental degradation applied to sensors in this environment.

physics_modifiers.description: Environmental modifications to physics parameters. Does NOT own physical laws — those belong to physics.schema.json. Provides per-environment overrides.

gravity_override_m_s2.description: Override gravity vector in world frame. SI: m/s². Overrides physics.schema.json value for this environment.

air_density_kg_m3.description: Air density used for aerodynamic drag computation. SI: kg/m³.

air_temperature_k.description: Ambient air temperature for thermal/aerodynamic computations. SI: K.

speed_of_sound_m_s.description: Speed of sound (for Mach number, sonic boom, etc.). SI: m/s.

wind_force_surface.description: Wind force at surface level used in physics integration.

ocean_current_surface.description: Surface ocean current velocity in world frame. SI: m/s.

buoyancy_fluid_density_kg_m3.description: Fluid density used for buoyancy calculation. SI: kg/m³.

global_friction_multiplier.description: Global friction scale factor applied to all contact pairs. 1.0 = nominal.

global_drag_multiplier.description: Global aerodynamic drag scale factor. 1.0 = nominal.

precipitation_effects.description: Physics effects of precipitation on traction and visibility.

thermal_gradient_k_m.description: Air temperature lapse rate. SI: K/m.

ai_metadata.description: AI reasoning, retrieval, and ontology integration metadata.

semantic_description.description: Rich natural language description for RAG retrieval and LLM world building.

mission_critical_factors.description: Environmental factors most critical to mission success (for LLM world model reasoning).

language_labels.description: Localised environment names keyed by ISO 639-1 code.

embedding_hint.description: Canonical text for vector embedding of this environment.

schema_refs.description: Cross-references to other PhysWorldLM schema documents.

world_id.description: UUID of the parent world.schema.json instance.

physics_schema_id.description: UUID of the physics.schema.json document governing this environment.

material_ids_referenced.description: UUIDs of material.schema.json instances referenced by this environment.

SOFAR_channel_depth_m.description: Sound Fixing And Ranging channel depth. SI: m.

urban_canyon_factor.description: Average building canyon aspect ratio (building height / street width).

notes.description: Free-form engineering notes, data source credits, or scenario caveats.

examples.environment_name: Kabul Urban Combat Environment — Summer Day

ai_metadata.semantic_description: High-altitude arid urban environment at 1800 m ASL. Thin air reduces engine and aerodynamic performance. High UV. Dust haze degrades EO sensors. Strong GPS availability. IADS threat.
